recommendations.title: Bulletproof Monk
recommendations.overview: A mysterious and immortal Tibetan kung fu master, who has spent the last 60 years traveling around the world protecting the ancient Scroll of the Ultimate, mentors a selfish street kid in the ancient intricacies of kung fu.

recommendations.title: Triumph of the Will
recommendations.overview: A showcase of German chancellor and Nazi Party leader Adolf Hitler at the 1934 Nuremberg Rally.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda: Secrets of the Masters
recommendations.overview: Po and the Furious Five uncover the legend of three of kung fu's greatest heroes: Master Thundering Rhino, Master Storming Ox, and Master Croc.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Hustle
recommendations.overview: It's the 1940s, and the notorious Axe Gang terrorizes Shanghai. Small-time criminals Sing and Bone hope to join, but they only manage to make lots of very dangerous enemies. Fortunately for them, kung fu masters and hidden strength can be found in un

recommendations.title: Downfall
recommendations.overview: In April of 1945, Germany stands at the brink of defeat with the Russian Army closing in from the east and the Allied Expeditionary Force attacking from the west. In Berlin, capital of the Third Reich, Adolf Hitler proclaims that Germany will still a

recommendations.title: Darkest Hour
recommendations.overview: In May 1940, the fate of World War II hangs on Winston Churchill, who must decide whether to negotiate with Adolf Hitler or fight on knowing that it could mean the end of the British Empire.

recommendations.title: The Way of the Dragon
recommendations.overview: After a Chinese restaurant in Rome is threatened by the mafia, who will stop at nothing to acquire the property, the owner recruits a family friend in Hong Kong, kung fu expert Tang Lung, to help them defend their business.

recommendations.title: Kung Pow: Enter the Fist
recommendations.overview: A movie within a movie, created to spoof the martial arts genre. Writer/director Steve Oedekerk uses contemporary characters and splices them into a 1970s kung-fu film, weaving the new and old together.  As the main character, The Chosen One, Oedeker

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda
recommendations.overview: Chosen by prophecy but doubted by all, Po is an unlikely Dragon Warrior—a clumsy panda thrust into the world of kung fu as a deadly enemy threatens the Valley of Peace. Under reluctant guidance by Master Shifu and the Furious Five, Po must embrace wh

recommendations.title: Monk Comes Down the Mountain
recommendations.overview: A monk leaves his monastery and ventures out into the real world for the first time in his life, and ends up in an adventure with a kung-fu master who is guarding a special artifact.
